title: Implement personal data authority and purpose-bound views
summary: Implement personal data authority and purpose-bound views

title: Evaluate malleable itemized software against conventional apps
summary: Evaluate malleable itemized software against conventional apps

title: Security, Update, and Assurance epic
summary: Define, test, and independently review the security and update model.

title: Conduct capability and IPC security design review
summary: Find authority amplification, confused-deputy, delegation, revocation, TOCTOU, message-validation, denial-of-service and audit weaknesses before API freeze.

title: Build continuous kernel and service fuzzing program
summary: Fuzz syscall, IDL, package, storage, network, USB, camera, cellular, update and backup parsers with minimized reproducible corpora.

title: Select and integrate cryptographic primitives and provider API
summary: Use reviewed cryptographic libraries/primitives through a narrow provider interface with algorithm agility, key separation, misuse resistance and test vectors.

title: Implement entropy collection and DRBG service
summary: Collect, health-test, condition and distribute entropy with explicit startup/failure/target quality and no silent weak fallback.

title: Implement key lifecycle and data-key hierarchy
summary: Generate, wrap, store, rotate, revoke, destroy, recover and migrate keys according to portable/rehydratable/non-exportable data classes.

title: Threat-model and red-team update/package pipeline
summary: Find signing, metadata, mirror, replay, freeze, mix-and-match, dependency, rollback, partial-install and recovery attacks.

title: Threat-model and validate recovery environment
summary: Ensure recovery authentication, data access, destructive operations, trust roots, media, physical access and factory/owner reset preserve declared security.

title: Implement data classification and privacy policy engine
Implement log, trace, crash, and evidence redaction controls
summary: Prevent secrets, personal data, protected protocol content and hardware identifiers from leaking through observability or public experiment bundles.

title: Implement package signing, SBOM, provenance, and revocation security
summary: Bind packages/components/firmware/models/data to publishers, builds, dependencies, licenses and revocation while supporting key rotation and compromise recovery.

title: Red-team agent capability, data, budget, and effect containment
summary: Prove malicious or erroneous agents cannot exceed grants, budgets, destinations, confirmation, effect class or receipt/compensation rules.

title: Commission independent kernel/platform security review
summary: Obtain an external architecture/code/test review of kernel, capabilities, IPC, memory, update, recovery and selected driver/service boundaries.

title: Operate vulnerability disclosure and incident response
summary: Provide continuous private intake, triage, embargo coordination, fixes, signed updates, advisories, safe harbor and lessons learned.

title: Maintain system assurance case and claim language
summary: Link security objectives to design controls, implementation, tests, reviews, residual assumptions, supported targets and update lifecycle.

title: Evaluate agent shadow mode and dangerous false-action rates
summary: Evaluate agent shadow mode and dangerous false-action rates
